meaning: v.嚎叫,怒吼,嚎啕大哭,喝住,号叫n.嚎叫,怒号,嚎哭
examples: They listened to the howl of the wind through the trees.
He sprang up with a howl.
The band also includes bits of noise collages and ambient breaks on "(Howl)" or "(Storm)".
Black Rebel Motorcycle Club's new album, Howl, unveils a new blues, country and gospel-inspired sound.
